screen.projects_tip: Pick an existing wapp to edit or start a new one. Selecting a wapp loads its title, id, description, and home.ui.json into the editor tabs.
screen.code_tip: Write a geogram wapp in C. Hit Compile to build it against the bundled wasm-clang, then Install to add it to the launcher.
screen.ui_tip: Visual + code editor for the wapp's GeoUI screens. Switch between a drag-free tree view of the blocks and the raw JSON in the same tab.
screen.translations_tip: Edit the wapp's lang/<locale>.json sidecars. Keys referenced as @key from the UI get translated at runtime via the user's active language.
screen.settings_tip: Metadata for the wapp you're editing. Title is what shows on the launcher grid; Name is the folder slug used on disk.
group.projects_tip: Every wapp installed under ~/.local/share/geogram/apps/. Built-in wapps (tester, tasks, …) are not editable here yet.
group.ui_editor_tip: Edit the screens bound to source_ui. Install writes them to screens/home.ui.json.
group.translations_tip: Pick a locale, extract @keys from the UI JSON, and fill in the translations.
group.identity_tip: These values end up in the generated manifest.json when you click Install.
group.runtime_tip: Control how the wapp runs — tick interval, HAL dependencies, and widget registration.
field.source_tip: Plain C against the geogram HAL (wapps/hal/geogram_wasm_hal.h). No libc.
field.compiler_output_tip: Compiler stdout and stderr, plus host-side progress messages.
field.title: Title
field.title_tip: Human-readable display name. This is what the launcher grid shows.
field.name: Name (folder slug)
field.name_tip: Short slug used as the folder name under ~/.local/share/geogram/apps/ and ~/.local/share/geogram/wapps/. Lowercase, no spaces.
field.id_tip: Stable identifier, goes into manifest.id. Convention: reverse-domain.
field.version_tip: Semantic version (e.g. 1.0.0). Written to manifest.version and included in the signature.
field.icon_tip: Type an emoji / single character, or click Choose SVG… to pick a vector icon file. Leave blank for the default Material icon.
field.tick_interval_tip: How often module_tick() is called, in milliseconds. Default 5000 (5 seconds). Set 0 to disable ticking.
field.hal_requires_tip: Comma-separated list of HAL functions this wapp needs. Available: log, kv, msg, i18n_get. The launcher checks these at load time.
field.provides_widgets_tip: Comma-separated list of functionalities this wapp provides for other wapps to use. Leave empty if none.
action.compile_tip: Run the bundled wasm-clang over the source above. Output goes to the log view below.
action.install_tip: Write the compiled wapp into the launcher's installed-apps folder. If no fresh compile is available this reuses the existing app.wasm (edit metadata / UI only).
action.run_tests_tip: Run the unit tests bundled in the installed wapp's tests.wasm. Results stream into the log view below.
